problems.description: Flat-rate quotes charge the same whether you have a studio or a mansion.

problems.title: Unpredictable Totals
problems.description: Not knowing your final cost until after the move creates budget anxiety.

problems.title: Minimum Charge Waste
problems.description: High minimums mean paying for time you don't need on smaller moves.

problems.title: Slow Worker Concerns
problems.description: Hourly billing makes you worry about movers dragging their feet.

solutions.title: Pay Only for Time Used
solutions.description: Simple hourly rates mean you only pay for the actual time your move takes.

solutions.title: Transparent Tracking
solutions.description: You see exactly how time is spent and can track costs as you go.

solutions.title: Low Minimums
solutions.description: Reasonable minimum hours make professional moving affordable for any size.

solutions.title: Efficient Crews
solutions.description: Our experienced teams work quickly because efficiency builds our reputation.

problems.title: Routine Disruption
problems.description: Moving disrupts carefully established routines that are essential for daily functioning.

problems.title: Sensory Overload
problems.description: The chaos, noise, and change of moving can be overwhelming and distressing.

problems.title: Medical Equipment Needs
problems.description: Essential equipment must be moved carefully and set up immediately at the new location.

problems.title: Accessibility Requirements
problems.description: Standard movers don't understand the specific layout needs for mobility and accessibility.

solutions.title: Minimal Disruption Approach
solutions.description: We work to maintain routines as much as possible throughout the moving process.

solutions.title: Calm, Patient Service
solutions.description: Our trained crews work quietly and patiently, respecting sensory sensitivities.

solutions.title: Priority Equipment Setup
solutions.description: Medical and essential equipment is unpacked and functional before anything else.

solutions.title: Accessibility Planning
solutions.description: We place furniture and items according to specific accessibility and mobility needs.
